title: Portable Empty Watercolour Paint Case, Compact Watercolor Box with Folding Palette, Travel Paint Box for Students, Lightweight and Portable Painting Pigment Box for Watercolor Packaging
features: Smooth Finish: The clean blue surface and rounded edges give the empty watercolour paint case a simple yet elegant look. The smooth finish feels comfortable to hold and complements any artist’s toolkit or desk setup

Dual Mixing Palette Zones: Designed with two separate color mixing areas, this paint palette offers enhanced flexibility for blending shades. The double-lid structure opens smoothly to provide a clean workspace, keeping tones pure and organized

Compact Size: Measuring 6.0cm × 3.9cm when closed and 10.5cm when unfolded, the travel paint box is designed for artists who value efficiency and mobility. It’s small enough to slip into a bag yet spacious enough for practical use

Convenient Hanging Hole: A small built-in hanging hole adds convenience to this portable palette. It can be attached to a keychain, lanyard, or backpack, making it practical for outdoor painting, sketching outdoors

Easy-To-Fill Pigment: The interior includes several divided pigment grids, making this watercolor subpackage box suitable for separating and storing different paint types. Artists can refill colors directly, maintaining a tidy palette layout
description: " Product Overview This portable watercolor box combines compact functionality with thoughtful artistry. Measuring 6.0cm × 3.9cm when closed and expanding to 10.5cm, it provides dual mixing zones, pigment compartments, and a convenient hanging hole for versatile use. Its foldable design enhances portability, while the clean blue finish adds a refined aesthetic. Compact And Lightweight Design This compact watercolor box fits easily into pockets, pencil cases, or art kits. Its lightweight structure allows artists to carry essential colors anywhere. The sleek rectangular shape ensures space-saving storage and easy handling during painting sessions. Portable Folding Design When unfolded, the folding watercolour palette extends to 10.5cm, offering additional space for color blending while maintaining portability. When folded, it reduces to 6cm, saving space and ensuring convenience for both studio and outdoor painting use. Dual-Zone Palette Layout The box features two mixing areas that allow color separation and blending. This watercolour palette layout ensures neat pigment organization and a smooth creative process in both indoor and outdoor settings. Pigment Storage Compartments Each compartment in the portable painting pigment box can hold different paint shades, making it convenient for creating custom color sets. The well-structured layout avoids color crossover and supports neat pigment refilling. Hanging Hole For Easy Carrying A hanging hole on the box edge allows flexible attachment to bags, keychains, or drawing kits. This design feature increases portability and accessibility for sketching trips and outdoor painting sessions. "
